title: 8 Signs You're Becoming the Man Worth Becoming
caption:
Growth is quiet. You usually don't know it's happening until you look back.

But there are signs. The anger that used to run you takes longer to arrive. You stopped needing to win every room. The people closest to you feel safe around you. You'd rather be corrected than comfortable.

These aren't achievements. They're indicators — the kind of man a godly life produces when you stay in it long enough.

Nobody's handing you a certificate. But if you recognize yourself in these, you're further along than you think.

"I have learned, in whatever state I am, to be content." — Philippians 4:11

Save this for the week it feels like nothing's changing.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #growth #discipleship #christianity #scripture #thevision
